---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new algorithm, API addition, or other enhancement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem does this solve?  Why is it needed?

## Proposed solution

Describe the API or behaviour change you have in mind.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought of and why you rejected them.

## Cryptographic notes

If the request involves a new algorithm or changes to key handling, please
note the relevant standard (FIPS number, IETF draft, etc.) and any known
implementation constraints.
